raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 23
Date 03 July 2026
Time 17:50
Title Infringement - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed GBR DOC 23 - Sprint Qualifying Deleted Lap Times.pdf
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury

 
 
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 
03 – 05 July 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 23 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  03 July 2026 
 
        Time  17:50 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Sprint Qualifying 
  
Fact The F1 car below did not use the track at turn 3 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 3 18  Lance Stroll Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 16:37:24 1:33.438 
 
 
Infringement Breach of Appendix L Chapter IV Article 2 c) of the FIA International Sporting Code and Article 
B1.8.6 of the FIA F1 Regulations. 
  
Decision Deletion of the lap time shown in accordance with Article 12.4.1.e of the FIA International 
Sporting Code.   
Note Competito
